subcodes.first_line: O Zayn, upon whom resteth My glory! Make mention, on behalf of this Wronged One, of the loved ones in all regions, O Secretary [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زین علیک بهائی اولیای اطراف را از قبل مظلوم ذکر نما جناب منشی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power of prayer, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
